'''yangoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnidity|arachnidity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnidity|arachnidity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yangoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || yængeteth || yængetej || yængetesh || yængete
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || yangongototh || yangongotoj || yangongotosh || yangongoto
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || yangototh || yangotoj || yangotosh || yangoto
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || yangoftofth || yangoftofj || yangoftofsh || yangoftof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || yangototho || yangotojo || yangotosho || yangotoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || yangototh || yangotoj || yangotosh || yangoto
|-
| [[Possessive]] || yangotothol || yangotojol || yangotoshol || yangotokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || yangotoothotho || yangotoojojo || yangotooshosho || yangotooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || yangotothon || yangotojon || yangotoshon || yangotokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || yangotothooro || yangotojooro || yangotoshooro || yangotokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
